summary: The user is exploring ways to reduce their environmental impact by seeking eco-friendly alternatives for daily routines, including cleaning products, personal care items, and lunch containers. They have recently switched to using reusable cloth towels, eco-friendly shampoo and conditioner from Acure, and are experimenting with DIY cleaning products using natural ingredients like baking soda and vinegar.
facts: The user has been making a conscious effort to switch to eco-friendly products for the past three months. The user recently replaced their old shampoo and conditioner with Acure, which offers eco-friendly, sulfate-free products. The user got a discount on their first purchase of Acure by using a coupon code from their website. The user has been experimenting with making their own cleaning products at home using natural ingredients like baking soda, vinegar, and essential oils. The user has been trying to reduce their use of paper towels by using reusable cloth towels instead. The user is currently using Seventh Generation laundry detergent and is loving the results. The user is thinking of reducing their use of single-use plastics, especially with their lunch and coffee habits. The user is interested in eco-friendly lunch containers and coffee cups that are durable and easy to clean.
